ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* Architecture of the model (e.g., simple, wide) */,
  "training_method" TEXT /* Training method used for the model (e.g., natural, FGSM, PGD) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the model */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was last updated */,
  "public" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the model is publicly accessible */,
  "framework" TEXT /* Framework used for the model (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used in the experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the experiment */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* JSON string containing the parameters used in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment that produced this result */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., accuracy, precision, recall) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the result */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the result */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was recorded */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the result */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was last updated */,
  "test_set" TEXT /* Name of the test set used for evaluation */,
  "adversarial_attack" TEXT /* Type of adversarial attack used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "team" TEXT /* Name of the research team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that this version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the version */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was last updated */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Message describing the changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model accessed (if applicable) */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment accessed (if applicable) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the model or experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model or experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the platform */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
